# Quick Fix: Clean AI-Generated Box-Drawing Comment Dividers
Generated: 2026-04-01T10-49-09Z

## Change Made
- Pattern: All `// ─── Section ───────` and `{/* ─── Section ─── */}` style dividers
- Replaced `//` style with `// Section Name` (simple comment)
- Replaced JSX `{/* */}` style with `{/* Section Name */}` (simple comment)
- Removed trailing `─` padding characters entirely
- Left `└─` in template literals (tree visualization in code content) unchanged

## Text Change
- File: `apps/web/src/components/sections/PersonalizationSection.tsx`
- Line 32: `"Streamlined taskbar with reduced noise."` → `"Clean taskbar, no clutter"`
